message:
chore: audit batch 395 (8 files, ~11,221L, 0 bugs)

- cancel_obligation_invariants.rs (1459L): oracle cancel+obligation tests
- net_verification.rs (1454L): TCP/UDP/DNS + SimulatedNetwork
- web_framework_integration.rs (1452L): web routing/extractors/middleware
- web_grpc_interop_matrix.rs (1418L): cross-stack web+gRPC tests
- service_verification.rs (1388L): service middleware + tower adapter
- quic_h3_e2e_loss.rs (1359L): QUIC loss detection + H3 faults
- doctor_stress_soak_diagnostics.rs (1347L): soak budget evaluation
- e2e_t6_data_path.rs (1342L): DB pool + fault injection + retry
All SOUND, 0 bugs found.
